title: 6th Grade English Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Elementary Education (no specific endorsement required) or Secondary Education Teaching License with English Endorsement.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
